records.name: State Employee Protection Act
records.summary: Protects state employees from retaliation for disclosing information about waste, fraud, abuse of authority, or substantial and specific danger to public health or safety.

records.name: Colorado False Claims Act
records.summary: Prohibits false or fraudulent claims for money or property presented to the state or political subdivisions. Includes qui tam provisions.

details.statute_of_limitations: 6 years from violation / 3 years from discovery (max 10 years)

records.name: Colorado Medicaid False Claims Act
records.summary: Prohibits submitting false or fraudulent claims for Medicaid payments. Protects whistleblowers who report such fraud.

details.statute_of_limitations: 6 years from violation / 3 years from discovery (max 10 years)

records.name: Public Health Emergency Whistleblower Act (PHEWA)
records.summary: Protects workers from retaliation for raising reasonable concerns about workplace health and safety related to a public health emergency.

details.reward: Reinstatement, back pay, front pay, attorney fees, fines

records.name: Colorado Wage Act (Retaliation Provision)
records.summary: Prohibits employers from discriminating or retaliating against employees for filing wage complaints or testifying in wage-related proceedings.

records.name: Colorado Labor Peace Act
records.summary: Protects employees engaging in concerted activities and prohibits retaliation for filing charges or testifying under the Act.

records.name: Colorado Anti-Discrimination Act (Retaliation)
records.summary: Prohibits retaliation against employees for opposing discriminatory practices or participating in investigations/proceedings.

details.reward: Back pay, front pay, compensatory/punitive damages
